name: tender-ai-root
description: Root package for running TENDER.AI full stack

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:ml"
scripts.install:all: npm install concurrently && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ML && pip install -r requirements.txt && winget install --id UB-Mannheim.TesseractOCR --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements && winget install --id ArtifexSoftware.Ghostscript --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements
